name: Pasta Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 large cans tomatoes (28 oz each, chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the garlic.
2. Chop the onions.
3. Sauté the minced garlic and chopped onions in a pot until fragrant.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes with juice, tomato sauce, and about 4 cups of water to the pot.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Stir in the great northern beans, oregano, salt, and pepper.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for about an hour.
8. Cook the Ditalini pasta separately according to package instructions until al dente.
9. Add the cooked pasta to the soup and stir gently.
10. Adjust seasoning if needed before serving.
